===''Pokémon the Series''=== ===={{aniseries|SM}}==== [[File:Olivia anime.png|thumb|220px|Olivia in {{aniseries|SM}}]] While not mentioned by name, in ''[[SM002|The Guardian's Challenge]]'', it is revealed that {{an|Kiawe}} completed Olivia's grand trial and received a [[Z-Ring]] from her prior to the start of {{aniseries|SM}}. She partially appeared in ''[[SM011|Young Kiawe Had a Farm!]]'' during a flashback, when Kiawe told {{Ash}} that the Z-Ring and [[Firium Z]] he had received from Olivia was his [[Kiawe's grandfather|grandfather]]'s. She was also mentioned in ''[[SM027|A Glaring Rivalry!]]'' when {{an|Gladion}} revealed that he obtained his [[Rockium Z]] from completing her grand trial. Olivia physically debuted in ''[[SM031|The Island Whisperer!]]'', where she traveled to [[Melemele Island]] and visited the [[Pokémon School]], taking {{Ash}} and {{ashcl}} to visit [[Akala Island]]. She continued to appear during throughout Ash and his classmates' stay on the island, first in ''[[SM032|Treasure Hunt, Akala Style!]]'', where she organized a class involving treasure hunting using [[Poké Ride|Stoutland Search]]. During the treasure hunt, {{an|Lana}} found a [[Sparkling Stone]], which Olivia took to be converted into a Z-Ring. The finished Z-Ring was returned to Lana in the [[SM033|next episode]]. In ''[[SM035|Currying Favor and Flavor!]]'', Olivia sent Ash and his classmates on a search for ingredients for the famous "Akala Curry". Ash was paired up with {{an|Mallow}}, with their search eventually leading them to [[Lush Jungle]], where Ash was challenged by {{pkmn2|Totem}} {{p|Lurantis}}. After Ash defeated Lurantis, Olivia showed up and revealed that the entire search had actually been a part of Ash's trial, and he now qualified to take on her grand trial. In ''[[SM036|Trials and Determinations!]]'', she battled Ash in his Akala Island grand trial at the [[Ruins of Life]], using Lycanroc and {{p|Probopass}} in a [[Double Battle]] against {{AP|Rowlet}} and {{AP|Rockruff}}. Despite their two opponents giving them a lot of trouble, Rowlet finally managed to defeat Probopass with {{m|Bloom Doom}}, only for Rockruff to impulsively attack and knock out Rowlet out of its desire to battle Lycanroc alone. Despite this setback, Rockruff was still able to defeat its evolved form, winning the battle for Ash. After the battle, Olivia gave Ash a [[Rockium Z]] and told him that Rockruff's behavior was a sign of it being ready to [[Evolution|evolve]] soon. In ''[[SM055|The Professors' New Adventure!]]'', Olivia attended the wedding of {{an|Professor Kukui}} and {{an|Professor Burnet}}. She reappeared in flashbacks in ''[[SM075|Some Kind of Laziness!]]'' and ''[[SM080|Not Caving Under Pressure!]]''. In ''[[SM088|Full Moon and Many Arms!]]'', Olivia was seen praying at the Ruins of Life while she waited for the [[Manalo Festival]] to begin. In ''[[SM090|Securing the Future!]]'', she joined the rest of Alola in restoring {{an|Necrozma}} to its {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Necrozma|true form}} by lending it some of her [[Z-Power]]. In ''[[SM103|Heart of Fire! Heart of Stone!]]'', Olivia met up with Ash and his classmates again when they visited Akala alongside {{an|Brock}} and {{an|Misty}}, who were visiting Alola. Brock became infatuated with her, resulting in Misty dragging him away. She agreed to a battle and used Lycanroc against {{TP|Brock|Sudowoodo}} but the battle was interrupted by {{TRT}} who attempted to steal the Pokémon. Brock and Olivia avoided capture and teamed up to attack Team Rocket with a heart shaped {{m|Continental Crush}}. In ''[[SM115|The Dealer of Destruction!]]'', Olivia, her fellow kahunas, and {{an|Lusamine}} helped Professor Kukui reveal the [[Alola League]] to the public. In ''[[SM121|A Recipe for Success!]]'', Olivia was visiting [[Aina's Kitchen]] when [[Abe]] asked Mallow to collect some ingredients from {{an|Oranguru}}. Mallow was gone for a while helping out at the Café, so Olivia started helping Abe at the Kitchen and was later joined by Ash and the rest of his classmates. Olivia later watched as Mallow returned with a [[Grassium Z]] given by {{DL|Guardian deities (anime)|Tapu Koko}}, and a [[Z-Ring]] given by Oranguru. She then cleaned and decorated the Z-Ring before giving it back to Mallow for her to use. In ''[[SM129|Battle Royal 151!]]'', Olivia appeared alongside her fellow kahunas, acting as a [[Battle judge|referee]] during the [[Battle Royal]] preliminary round of the [[Manalo Conference]]. In ''[[SM130|Battling Besties!]]'', Olivia refereed the second pair of first-round matches: one between [[Hau]] and [[Samson Oak]], and the other between Mallow and Lana. From ''[[SM132|Imitation Is the Sincerest Form of Strategy!]]'' to ''[[SM134|The Road to The Semifinals!]]'', she continued observing the Manalo Conference battles. She then refereed the semifinals battle between Kiawe and {{an|Gladion}} in ''[[SM135|The Final Four!]]'' and ''[[SM136|Getting Down to The Ire!]]''. Afterwards, in ''[[SM138|Final Rivals!]]'' and ''[[SM139|Enter the Champion!]]'', she watched the finals battle between Ash and Gladion in the stands. After the final battle ended, Olivia attended the award ceremony for the winner, only for it to be interrupted when a {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Manalo Stadium Guzzlord|Guzzlord}} arrived at the stadium through an [[Ultra Wormhole]]. In ''[[SM140|Z-Move Showdown!]]'', Olivia and the other island kahunas joined forces to battle Guzzlord. The guardian deities later came to their assistance, using their powers to keep Guzzlord in place long enough for Olivia and the others to fire off their [[Z-Move]]s. The combined attacks launched Guzzlord back into the wormhole it came out of, successfully sending it back into [[Ultra Space]]. In ''[[SM141|Exhibition Unmasked!]]'', ''[[SM143|Fiery Surprises!]]'', and ''[[SM144|From Z to Shining Z!]]'', Olivia watched the {{wp|exhibition game|exhibition match}} between Ash and Professor Kukui. In ''[[SM145|Dreams of the Sun and Moon!]]'', Olivia acted as the referee during Ash's battle against Kiawe. After the battle, Olivia spoke with Ash and motivated him to travel around the world. ====Character==== Olivia is highly energetic and sweet by nature. However, she is also very clumsy, constantly getting knocked to the ground during simple tasks like walking up the stairs or opening a door. She also possesses the unique ability to communicate with Pokémon on a different level than most people, giving her a natural affinity even with highly guarded and aggressive Pokémon such as [[Kiawe's Turtonator]] and [[Ash's Litten]]. ====Pokémon==== This listing is of Olivia's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{MissingInfo|1|java}} =====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |main=Olivia's Lycanroc |trainer=Olivia |pkmn=Lycanroc |stage1=Rockruff |type1=Rock |img=Olivia Lycanroc.png |epnum=SM031 |epname=The Island Whisperer! |vajp=Yūji Ueda |vaen=Mike Liscio |desc=Midday {{p|Lycanroc}} is Olivia's first known Pokémon which evolved from a {{p|Rockruff}}. When it was still a Rockruff it ran away from Olivia right before it was going to evolve. When it returned to Olivia, it had already evolved into Lycanroc. Some time later, Lycanroc was used in Olivia's [[Island challenge|grand trial]] battle against {{an|Kiawe}} and his {{TP|Kiawe|Turtonator}} and was defeated, earning Kiawe [[Kiawe's grandfather|his grandfather]]'s [[Z-Ring]] and a [[Firium Z]].}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Olivia |pkmn=Probopass |type1=Rock |type2=Steel |img=Olivia Probopass.png |epnum=SM036 |epname=Trials and Determinations! |vajp= |vaen=Carter Cathcart |desc={{p|Probopass}} is Olivia's second known Pokémon. It was used during Olivia's grand trial battle against Ash, where it teamed up with Lycanroc to battle Ash's Rockruff and Rowlet. Despite proving to be powerful and troubling opponent, Probopass was eventually defeated by Rowlet's {{m|Bloom Doom}}. It appeared again in ''[[SM080|Not Caving Under Pressure!]]'', during a flashback. Probopass's known moves are {{m|Stealth Rock}}, {{m|Magnet Bomb}}, {{m|Zap Cannon}}, and {{m|Giga Impact}}.}} =====Ride Pokémon===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Olivia |pkmn=Tauros |type1=Normal |gender=male |img=Olivia Tauros.png |cap=A Poké Ride Tauros |epnum=SM033 |epname=Big Sky, Small Fry! |vajp= |vaen= |desc=Olivia used a [[Poké Ride]] {{p|Tauros}} to travel through [[Paniola Town]] in ''[[SM033|Big Sky, Small Fry!]]''. None of Tauros's moves are known.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{fairy egg color light}}|bordercolor={{fairy egg color dark}} |ja=沢城みゆき ''[[Miyuki Sawashiro]]'' |da=Mette Skovmark |en=[[Marisa Kennedy]] |fi=Katja Sirkiä ([[SM031]]-[[SM037]])
